name: Wardha Road
metaTitle: Property in Wardha Road Nagpur | Plots & Flats | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA approved plots on Wardha Road Nagpur. Prime location connecting city to MIHAN & airport. Starting ₹22 Lakh. 90% bank finance available.
heroSubheading: Nagpur's Most Connected Corridor — From City Centre to Airport
introduction: Wardha Road is Nagpur's most important arterial road, stretching from the heart of the city all the way to the international airport and MIHAN. It passes through established localities like Somalwada, Besa, Beltarodi, and Wardha Road Extension, offering a mix of residential, commercial, and investment opportunities. The corridor has been significantly upgraded with widened roads, flyovers, and seamless metro connectivity planned. As a result, properties along Wardha Road continue to see steady appreciation. For buyers looking for a balance of connectivity, infrastructure, and proximity to Nagpur's economic engine at MIHAN, Wardha Road is the strongest choice in 2025. Mahalaxmi Infra has multiple completed and ongoing projects along this corridor, all NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved.
whyInvest: Connects Nagpur city centre to MIHAN and International Airport
Somalwada, Besa, Beltarodi — fully developed social infrastructure
Metro connectivity planned for key nodes along the route
Widened roads, flyovers, and drainage — infrastructure complete

faqs.question: Why is Wardha Road the best location to buy property in Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Wardha Road connects central Nagpur to MIHAN, AIIMS, IIM, and the international airport. It has excellent schools, hospitals, and malls, with consistent appreciation and strong resale value.

faqs.question: What localities are on Wardha Road Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Key localities include Somalwada, Besa, Beltarodi, Jamtha, Sumthana, and Shankarpur. All are well-connected and have NMRDA-approved residential layouts.

faqs.question: Are Mahalaxmi Infra projects on Wardha Road RERA approved?
faqs.answer: Yes. All Mahalaxmi Infra projects on and near Wardha Road carry NMRDA sanction, RERA registration (A50500044725), and are bank-finance eligible.

faqs.question: What is the price of plots on Wardha Road Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Plot prices on Wardha Road vary by exact location and size. Mahalaxmi Infra projects in this corridor start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for an updated price list.
